problem_title: Travel Rule evidence becomes hard to trace
problem_description: Exchanges struggle to maintain a clear and complete audit trail when Travel Rule messages, exceptions, and routing statuses are scattered across multiple providers. This fragmentation complicates compliance reviews and weakens the ability to defend decisions during audits.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes message data, exception handling, routing status, wallet and customer records into one traceable workflow that streamlines Travel Rule audit readiness for exchange compliance teams.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule exception to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule messages and exceptions through status tracking, case creation, review, and evidence preservation for audit-ready compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule message data, routing status, exceptions, cases and customer-wallet records into one compliance workflow for exchanges and digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage Travel Rule exceptions?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes, tracks and flags incomplete, failed or high-risk Travel Rule messages, creating structured cases for manual review and escalation within exchange compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: Travel Rule messages, decision logs, case history and linked customer and transaction data are preserved by SFTY as evidence-grade records ready for audit or regulatory review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with multiple Travel Rule providers, aggregating their outputs into a connected compliance layer without disrupting existing infrastructure or workflows within exchanges.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows, cases and reports rather than replacing them as a compliance control layer.
final_title: Review Travel Rule audit evidence and workflows
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, exceptions and case evidence into controlled compliance reviews for exchanges.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
